name: steam-mcp
description: Read-only Steam: friends, games, playtime, achievements, sales, reviews, live player counts.
long_description:
A read-only Model Context Protocol server for the public Steam Web API and storefront. Ask about your friends and their live status, your owned games and playtime, achievement progress and rarity, plus account-independent things like what's on sale, review scores (lifetime and last-30-days), live concurrent player counts, and patch notes.

Bring your own key: each user supplies their own free Steam Web API key, requested securely on install. The server is strictly read-only — it never sends messages, changes status, launches games, or makes purchases. Note that friends lists, owned games, and achievements are only visible when the target Steam profile's privacy is set to Public.

tools.name: steam_resolve_vanity_url
tools.description: Resolve a vanity name or profile URL to a SteamID64

tools.name: steam_get_player_summary
tools.description: Profile and live status (Online/Away/In-Game) for 1-100 users

tools.name: steam_get_friend_list
tools.description: A user's friends, enriched with name and live status

tools.name: steam_find_friends_who_own
tools.description: Which of a user's friends own (or are playing) a given game

tools.name: steam_get_user_groups
tools.description: The Steam groups/clans a user belongs to (name, URL, member count)

tools.name: steam_get_inventory
tools.description: A user's inventory — game items or Steam Community items (cards, emoticons), with tradable/marketable flags

tools.name: steam_get_market_price
tools.description: Community Market price for an item (lowest/median/volume) with type/rarity and CS2 condition

tools.name: steam_get_owned_games
tools.description: Owned games with total and recent hours played

tools.name: steam_analyze_library
tools.description: Backlog, playtime distribution, and abandoned games across a whole library

tools.name: steam_get_recently_played_games
tools.description: Games played in the last two weeks

tools.name: steam_get_steam_level
tools.description: A user's Steam community level

tools.name: steam_get_player_bans
tools.description: VAC / game / community / economy ban status

tools.name: steam_get_player_achievements
tools.description: Per-game unlocked vs locked achievements

tools.name: steam_get_game_schema
tools.description: A game's full achievement and stat definitions

tools.name: steam_get_global_achievement_percentages
tools.description: Global achievement rarity (unlock %)

tools.name: steam_get_user_game_stats
tools.description: A user's in-game stats (kills, wins, distance, etc.) for a game

tools.name: steam_get_rarest_unlocks
tools.description: A player's rarest unlocked achievements in a game, by global rarity

tools.name: steam_search_apps
tools.description: Search the store by title to find a game's appid

tools.name: steam_discover
tools.description: Find/recommend games by tag, price, sale, platform — optionally personalized to a user's taste

tools.name: steam_should_i_buy
tools.description: Buying brief: price, lifetime + recent reviews, tags, Metacritic, and taste match

tools.name: steam_recommend
tools.description: Recommend games like a seed game or your taste, with the matching tags as reasons

tools.name: steam_plan_coop_night
tools.description: Co-op games the host and friends all own, ranked by owners, with who's online now

tools.name: steam_get_app_details
tools.description: Full store details: price, devs, genres, play modes/co-op, controller, DLC, languages, requirements

tools.name: steam_get_app_regional_pricing
tools.description: A game's price across regions, each in its own local currency

tools.name: steam_get_workshop_item
tools.description: Steam Workshop item metadata (title, game, tags, subscribers, favorites, views)

tools.name: steam_get_dlc
tools.description: A game's DLC, with live prices and what's on sale

tools.name: steam_get_app_tags
tools.description: A game's top community tags (Souls-like, Roguelike, Cozy, etc.)

tools.name: steam_get_app_reviews
tools.description: Review score and samples, lifetime or last-N-days

tools.name: steam_get_featured_specials
tools.description: Games currently on sale (regional)

tools.name: steam_get_store_highlights
tools.description: Top sellers, new releases, or coming soon

tools.name: steam_get_wishlist
tools.description: A user's wishlist, with live prices and what's on sale

tools.name: steam_get_player_badges
tools.description: Badges + the XP breakdown behind a user's Steam level

tools.name: steam_get_package_details
tools.description: Details for a package/bundle (price, included games)

tools.name: steam_compare_players
tools.description: Shared games between two users, with playtime

tools.name: steam_get_current_players
tools.description: Live concurrent player count for a game

tools.name: steam_get_app_news
tools.description: Recent news and patch notes for a game

steam_api_key.title: Steam Web API Key
steam_api_key.description: Your personal Steam Web API key (32 hex characters). Get one free at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey
